analyst_briefing: STAGFLATION regime holds at HIGH conviction: system_average -0.664 (04-07) corroborated by new CC signals (US CPI +2.5% YoY, services PMI 49.8 contraction, Eurozone inflation/ECB hikes) and SA trade coercion (US anti-DMA clauses, visa restrictions). Three+ indicators confirm no regime shift despite weekly Medium note on EU Turnberry deal. Asset classes: 6/8 BEARISH with major deviations (EM Equities -0.869, Energy -0.865); Tech/Bonds flag divergence vs weekly Bullish/Neutral summaries—annotate blind spots (govt bonds yield over-score, tech fiscal skew). TS oil spike episodic, lacking SA support; China bond divergence flags non-US resilience. Tail risks: tariff rung 4 escalation (45% prob, ESA-linked), ECB-Fed split (55%), Hormuz rupture (35%). Cross-flags: ESA HIGH on EU yields/policy; ERM Medium oil. Blind spots stable. Distinguish: SA coercion structural, TS geo-noise transient; conviction sustained absent 3x SA flip.
